records.display_name: MNR new schedule August 29 with service at 82% of pre-pandemic

payload.claim_text: Metro-North implemented a new schedule on August 29, 2021 with service increasing to 82% of pre-pandemic levels and weekend service returning to full pre-pandemic levels.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

records.raw_text: Metro-North planned and implemented a new schedule on Sunday, August 29th with service increasing to 82% of pre-pandemic levels and weekend service returning to full pre-pandemic levels.

records.display_name: Bike permits no longer required on MNR and LIRR

payload.claim_text: Metro-North and Long Island Rail Road customers are no longer required to have a bike permit to travel with bikes.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad and Long Island Rail Road

records.raw_text: Metro-North and Long Island Rail Road customers are no longer required to have a bike permit to travel with bikes.

records.display_name: Off-peak fares extended through end of year

payload.claim_text: Off-peak fares on LIRR and Metro-North will remain in effect through the end of the year.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad and Long Island Rail Road

records.raw_text: off-peak fares on the Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North will remain in effect through the end of the year

records.display_name: Port Washington Branch first branch with full concrete ties

payload.claim_text: LIRR completed making the Port Washington Branch the first branch with full concrete ties on August 29, 2021.
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road

records.raw_text: On August 29th, we completed making the Port Washington Branch our first branch with full concrete ties.

records.display_name: LIRR opened locomotive shop in Morris Park

payload.claim_text: LIRR officially opened the locomotive shop in Morris Park, providing a modern facility to better maintain the diesel fleet.
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road

records.raw_text: we've officially opened the locomotive shop in Morris Park, which gives us a modern facility to better maintain our diesel fleet
